name: Tibetan Seaberry (Omegia Sea Buckthorn)
description: Tibetan Seaberry is an organic whole sea buckthorn fruit powder with Omega 3-6-7-9. Known as 'holy fruit' in Tibet, sea buckthorn contains over 190 nutrients and phytonutrients. Omegia is a unique standardized formula with balanced ratio of all unsaturated fatty acids.
benefits: Helps to reduce the appearance of wrinkles
Helps alleviates dry eyes and dry mouth
Rich in nutrients and powerful antioxidant (70X stronger than vitamin C)

dosage.therapeutic: 1 sachet per day, may consume directly or mix with water/beverages
dosage.general: May consume directly from sachet or mix with water or beverages

ingredients: Omegia whole sea buckthorn fruit powder (mixture of organic sea buckthorn juice and organic sea buckthorn oil)
who_can_consume: Vegans seeking complete omega source, general consumers wanting immune support, skin health, and omega supplementation.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or have specific health conditions.

qa.question: What makes Omegia Sea Buckthorn special?
qa.answer: Omegia contains the highest known concentration of Omega 7 in the animal or plant kingdom. It contains over 190 nutrients and phytonutrients, high amounts of vitamins, minerals, fiber, and protein. Omega 7 is effective in preventing cardiovascular disease and cholesterol accumulation.

qa.question: Is this suitable for vegans?
qa.answer: Yes, Tibetan Seaberry is a complete vegan omega source. It provides a balanced ratio of Omega-3, 6, 7, and 9 fatty acids from organic sources.
